200.description: List of images that match the search criteria

get.summary: Get the latest breed identification labels for an image

post.description: Uploads an image for processing. This is an opaque asynchronous operation. The response includes a `links.status` URL which SHOULD be polled to check the progress of the image analysis and optimization.

requestBody.description: Image upload payload. Provide either a binary file or a base64 encoded string.

file.description: Binary image file when uploading using multipart/form-data

image.description: Base64 encoded image data when uploading without a file

sub_id.description: Optional sub identifier associated with the image

file.description: Binary image file when uploading using multipart/form-data

image.description: Base64 encoded image data when uploading without a file

sub_id.description: Optional sub identifier associated with the image

200.description: Uploaded image metadata. NOTE: The `status` field in this initial response will likely be `to_be_reviewed`. Use the `links.status` URL to poll for the final `clean` or `unsafe` status.

get.description: Returns the current processing status of the image. Clients should poll this endpoint until the status changes from `to_be_reviewed` to `clean` or `unsafe`, then `labelled`.

200.description: Current status of the image processing

status.description: The current status of the image analysis. Possible values: `to_be_reviewed` (processing), `clean` (approved and starting labelling), `unsafe` (rejected), `flagged` (requires manual review) `does_not_contain_species` (rejected), and finally `labelled` (ready for use).

get.summary: Get the processing status of an uploaded image

post.description: This endpoint uploads an image and waits for analysis to complete before returning the result. The response includes the analysis status and any detected tags.

requestBody.description: Image upload payload. Provide either a binary file or a base64 encoded string.

file.description: Binary image file when uploading using multipart/form-data

image.description: Base64 encoded image data when uploading without a file

sub_id.description: Optional sub identifier associated with the image

file.description: Binary image file when uploading using multipart/form-data

image.description: Base64 encoded image data when uploading without a file

sub_id.description: Optional sub identifier associated with the image

200.description: Uploaded image metadata with completed analysis results

post.summary: Upload an image and wait for analysis to complete
Request an image to be made public

get.summary: Get the public request status for an image

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of results returned (default 1000)

200.description: Detailed list of sub_ids with counts

get.summary: Get detailed list of sub_ids used in the account along with counts representing usage activity

info.title: TheDogAPI
info.description: REST API documentation for the TheDogAPI created by ThatAPICompany. Documentation and tutorials available at https://docs.thedogapi.com

x-api-key.name: x-api-key
x-api-key.description: API key required to access protected resources

fact.example: The German Shepherd is known for its efficient 'flying trot,' a gait where all four feet are momentarily off the ground, allowing for exceptional speed and endurance. This gait, favored in herding and police work, is a result of specific angulation in their hindquarters, enabling them to cover vast distances with minimal energy expenditure. The correct angulation is vital for breed standard and working ability.

source_urls.description: Array of source URLs for the fact

species_id.description: Species ID this fact belongs to

indoor.description: Indicates whether the breed is suitable for indoor living.

lap.description: Whether the breed enjoys sitting on laps.

adaptability.description: Adaptability of the breed on a 1-5 scale.

affection_level.description: Affection level of the breed on a 1-5 scale.

child_friendly.description: Suitability for households with children on a 1-5 scale.

cat_friendly.description: Compatibility with other cats on a 1-5 scale.

dog_friendly.description: Compatibility with dogs on a 1-5 scale.

energy_level.description: Typical energy level on a 1-5 scale.

health_issues.description: Propensity for health issues on a 1-5 scale.

shedding_level.description: Amount of shedding on a 1-5 scale.

stranger_friendly.description: How friendly the breed is towards strangers on a 1-5 scale.

vocalisation.description: How vocal the breed is on a 1-5 scale.

hairless.description: Indicates if the breed is hairless.

rare.description: Whether the breed is considered rare.

rex.description: Whether the breed possesses the rex mutation.

suppressed_tail.description: Whether the breed commonly has a suppressed tail.

short_legs.description: Whether the breed commonly has short legs.

family_friendly.description: Narrative describing the breed with families.

good_with_other_dogs_score.description: Score indicating friendliness with other dogs.

good_with_other_dogs_context.description: Context for the breed’s compatibility with other dogs.

shedding_reason.description: Explanation of the breed’s shedding tendencies.

daily_exercise_time_minutes.description: Recommended daily exercise time in minutes.

exercise_type.description: Suggested exercise types for the breed.

prey_drive_score.description: Prey drive score on a 1-5 scale.

prey_drive_reason.description: Reasoning behind the prey drive score.

common_uses.description: Common uses for the horse breed.

notable_traits.description: Notable traits of the horse breed.

species_id.description: Identifier of the species that the image belongs to

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

species_id.description: Species identifier that the breed belongs to.

life_span.description: Expected life span of the breed.

temperament.description: Typical temperament traits for the breed.

country_codes.description: Comma separated country codes associated with the breed.

country_code.description: Primary country code for the breed.

description.example: Large, athletic working dog with erect ears, noble expression, and confident bearing. Known for high intelligence, loyalty, courage, and versatility in herding and working roles.

history.example: Developed in 1899 by Captain Max von Stephanitz to create the ideal herding dog, standardized from local shepherd dogs. Intelligence and trainability led to worldwide use in police and military roles.

wikipedia_url.description: Wikipedia article URL for the breed.

reference_image_id.description: Reference image identifier for the breed.

bred_for.description: What the breed was originally bred for.

perfect_for.description: Ideal uses or owners for the breed.

indoor.description: Indicates if the breed is suited for indoor living.

lap.description: Whether the breed enjoys being in laps.

affection_level.description: Affection level score on a 1-5 scale.

child_friendly.description: Child friendliness score on a 1-5 scale.

cat_friendly.description: Compatibility with cats score on a 1-5 scale.

dog_friendly.description: Compatibility with dogs score on a 1-5 scale.

energy_level.description: Energy level score on a 1-5 scale.

grooming.description: Grooming requirement score on a 1-5 scale.

health_issues.description: Health issues propensity score on a 1-5 scale.

shedding_level.description: Shedding level score on a 1-5 scale.

social_needs.description: Social needs score on a 1-5 scale.

stranger_friendly.description: Stranger friendliness score on a 1-5 scale.

experimental.description: Indicates if the breed is experimental.

hairless.description: Indicates if the breed is hairless.

natural.description: Indicates if the breed occurs naturally.

rare.description: Indicates if the breed is rare.

rex.description: Indicates if the breed possesses the rex mutation.

suppressed_tail.description: Indicates if the breed has a suppressed tail.

short_legs.description: Indicates if the breed has short legs.

hypoallergenic.description: Indicates if the breed is hypoallergenic.

cfa_url.description: Cat Fanciers Association URL related to the breed.

vetstreet_url.description: Vetstreet article URL related to the breed.

vcahospitals_url.description: VCA Hospitals article URL related to the breed.

male_height_inches.description: Average male height in inches for dog breeds.

male_height_cm.description: Average male height in centimeters for dog breeds.

female_height_inches.description: Average female height in inches for dog breeds.

female_height_cm.description: Average female height in centimeters for dog breeds.

male_weight_pounds.description: Average male weight in pounds for dog breeds.

male_weight_kg.description: Average male weight in kilograms for dog breeds.

female_weight_pounds.description: Average female weight in pounds for dog breeds.

female_weight_kg.description: Average female weight in kilograms for dog breeds.

family_friendly.description: Narrative describing family friendliness for dog breeds.
family_friendly.example: Good with children when properly socialized and trained, protective of family. It's not recommended to leave children unsupervised with dogs.

good_with_other_dogs_score.description: Score indicating compatibility with other dogs.

good_with_other_dogs_context.description: Additional context about compatibility with other dogs.
good_with_other_dogs_context.example: Generally friendly with proper socialization, but can be selective with unfamiliar dogs due to protective nature

shedding_score.description: Shedding score on a 1-5 scale for dog breeds.

shedding_reason.description: Explanation of shedding tendencies for dog breeds.
shedding_reason.example: Extreme year-round and seasonal shedding from thick double coat, often called 'German Shedders'

grooming_score.description: Grooming score on a 1-5 scale for dog breeds.

grooming_type.description: Description of grooming requirements for dog breeds.
grooming_type.example: Regular brushing 2-3 times weekly, daily during seasonal coat blows

daily_exercise_time_minutes.description: Recommended daily exercise time in minutes for dog breeds.

exercise_type.description: Suggested exercise types for dog breeds.
exercise_type.example: Running hiking agility work mental stimulation herding activities

bidability_score.description: Bidability score on a 1-5 scale for dog breeds.

bidability_characteristics.example: Extremely trainable, highly intelligent, work-focused and eager to please, excels in obedience

prey_drive_score.description: Prey drive score on a 1-5 scale for dog breeds.

prey_drive_reason.description: Explanation of the prey drive score for dog breeds.
prey_drive_reason.example: Moderate prey drive with strong herding instincts, may chase smaller animals

barking_score.description: Barking score on a 1-5 scale for dog breeds.

barking_characteristics.description: Explanation of barking behaviours for dog breeds.
barking_characteristics.example: Alert barker and excellent watchdog, protective rather than nuisance barking

language.description: Language code used for dog breed translations.

image.description: Reference image information for the breed.

species_id.description: Species identifier that this category belongs to
Identifier of the species that the image belongs to

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

categories.description: Associated category metadata for the image

unsafe_reasons.description: Reasons why the image failed safety checks

image_id.description: Identifier of the image voted on

created_at.description: Timestamp when the vote was created

value.description: Vote value (1 for upvote, -1 for downvote)

image_id.description: Identifier of the image to vote on

value.description: Vote value (1 for upvote, -1 for downvote)

usage.description: Number of images uploaded this month

remaining.description: Remaining images allowed to be uploaded this month

conditions.example: Must be desexed, muzzled in public

description.example: Dogs over 35cm shoulder height banned in urban areas

date_of_birth.description: ISO date string for date of birth. Provide this OR age_years/age_months.

age_years.description: Age in years. Used with age_months to compute date_of_birth.

age_months.description: Age in months (0-11). Used with age_years to compute date_of_birth.

poses.description: JSON string mapping file index (0-based) to pose enum value. E.g. {"0":"front","1":"side"}

pet_age_months.description: The pet's age in months when this image was taken

description.description: Description of the pet at the time of the photos

estimated_age_months.description: Estimated age of the pet in months

muscle_wasting_risk.description: A wasting risk flag indicating obvious muscle loss.

muscle_condition_reasons.example: Prominent spine and sharp scapular borders are visible, indicating severe muscle wasting.

age_years.description: Age in years at the time images were taken

age_months.description: Age in months (0-11) at the time images were taken

poses.description: JSON string mapping file index to pose enum. E.g. {"0":"front","2":"back"}

description.description: Description of the pet at the time of the photos

date_of_birth.description: ISO date for date of birth

score.description: Body Condition Score according to WSAVA 9-point scale

reasons.example: The ribs are easily felt without excess fat covering. The waist is easily observed behind ribs when viewed from above.

age_months.description: Estimated age of the pet in months

reasons.example: Teeth show mild tartar accumulation typical of a 3 year old. Coat is still vibrant with no typical signs of greying around the muzzle. Eyes are clear.

wasting_risk_flag.description: A wasting risk flag indicating obvious muscle loss.

reasons.example: Prominent spine and sharp scapular borders are visible, indicating severe muscle wasting.

style.description: The style of portrait to generate (e.g., studio, pack_leader, birthday_party)

id.description: Unique identifier of the favourite entry

sub_id.description: Custom identifier provided when creating the favourite

created_at.description: Timestamp when the favourite was created

image.description: Image metadata associated with the favourite

image_id.description: Identifier of the image to favourite

sub_id.description: Optional sub identifier to group favourites

client_ip_address.description: Client IP address used for auditing

country_code.description: ISO Alpha-2 country code derived from the request

id.description: Unique identifier for the health tip

sources.description: Array of sources for the health tip

species_id.description: Species ID this health tip belongs to

request_message.description: Optional message to the admin explaining why this image should be public

images.description: Number of images associated with this sub_id

votes.description: Number of votes associated with this sub_id

favourites.description: Number of favourites associated with this sub_id

pets.description: Number of pets associated with this sub_id
